gold_projects.name: MOUVE Studio (DSP Replacement)

completed_phases.name: Design
completed_phases.summary: Full brainstorm (14 questions). Design doc covers: data model (15 tables), Stripe integration, parent portal (7 pages), admin dashboard (12 pages), GHL sync (7 event types), Trigger.dev orchestration, 6 build phases, migration strategy with card capture campaign.
